title: Student Welfare Measures
tagline: Comprehensive support systems for every NSEC student.
overview: NSEC is committed to the holistic welfare of its students through financial aid, health support, transport, and mentoring programs.
The institution provides multiple scholarship schemes to ensure that meritorious and economically challenged students can pursue quality education.
A dedicated Student Welfare Committee oversees all welfare activities and ensures prompt resolution of student concerns.
Transport facilities, health insurance, and anti-ragging measures ensure a safe and supportive campus experience.

scholarships.name: Merit Scholarship
scholarships.description: Awarded to top performers in each semester across all departments based on SGPA rankings.

scholarships.name: SC/ST Scholarship
scholarships.description: State Government scholarship for SC/ST students as per West Bengal Government norms.

scholarships.name: OBC Scholarship
scholarships.description: Other Backward Classes scholarship provided through state government channels.

scholarships.name: Minority Scholarship
scholarships.description: Central government scholarship for minority community students pursuing technical education.

scholarships.name: Kanyashree Scholarship
scholarships.description: West Bengal Government scheme supporting girl students in higher education.

scholarships.name: TIG Merit Award
scholarships.description: Special award by Techno India Group for students with outstanding academic performance.

support_measures: Dedicated Student Counsellor for mental health and personal guidance
Anti-Ragging Squad and Monitoring Committee for campus safety
24/7 security and CCTV surveillance across the campus
Transport facilities for students commuting from remote areas
Group Mediclaim insurance coverage for all enrolled students
Free use of sports and recreation facilities
Separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with Wi-Fi

committees.name: Student Welfare Committee
committees.role: Oversees all student welfare schemes and activities

committees.name: SC/ST Cell
committees.role: Assists SC/ST students with scholarships and support

committees.name: Women's Cell
committees.role: Safeguards the rights and dignity of female students

contact.name: Student Welfare Office
contact.address: Netaji Subhash Engineering College, Garia, Kolkata - 700152
